title: CosmicPings
description: CosmicPings is a visual mod that allows for waypoints & team pings. Specifically made for CosmicSky & CosmicPrisons, brought to you by the Minecoin team.
body:
# ❣️ What is CosmicPings?
CosmicPings is a mod that was developed by the [Minecoin](https://discord.gg/minecoin) team to bring back an immensely useful feature utilized throughout the Cosmoverse. Easily connect and coordinate with your team by instantly sharing your location and status, ensuring everyone knows where to go and can respond quickly when it matters most.

## ✅ Features

### Ping Screen Visuals
Get an on screen visual showing exactly where your team member pinged so you know immediately where to go and the distance to their ping.

![Ping Screen Visuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9e5d0edead08cace04bf5173b687043d9bdd049_0.webp)

### Alliance/Gang/Truce Chat Ping Messages
Drop a ping and let your team know exactly where you are! Display your zone, coordinates, and even your health!

![Alliance/Gang/Truce Chat Ping Messages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce432f8aaffe549c724e9f788119b7b3a2dcd197.png)

### Ping Customization Menu
Customize and toggle different aspects of the mod such as the size, volume, color, & more!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c42eab7a244a121c661ddcb9bbcc115a4c77745c.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/915d19569cc3fed2d2da55e6c496ebd343aa1de8.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1d8d7e597de3a147e9a329e53051bdd9afdd3c5.png)

## ❓ How to add the mod to Lunar Client:

- Open Lunar Client's version selector and click on the version you wish to use
- Press the ⚙️ button at the bottom right, then select the Mods tab at the top
- Drag the mod into the window
